headline: MCMC Orders Internet Shutdowns 4 Times During 2025
context: MCMC ordered internet throttling or shutdowns 4 times in 2025 including during Sabah by-election and protests.

cards.big: MCMC ordered internet shutdowns 4 times in 2025 including elections
cards.sub: Digital rights groups condemn shutdowns as violation of information access

cards.big: Sabah by-election throttling lasted 18 hours affecting 280,000 users
cards.sub: MCMC cited preventing spread of unverified results as justification

cards.big: Protest-related shutdowns affected 1.2 million users for 6-12 hours
cards.sub: Mobile speeds reduced to unusable 0.5 Mbps in protest areas

cards.big: Access Now listed Malaysia among 28 countries ordering shutdowns in 2025
cards.sub: Economic cost of 4 shutdowns estimated at RM85 million lost productivity

cards.big: Internet shutdowns test whether government can restrict access without democratic accountability
4 internet shutdowns in 2025 by MCMC. Network disruption is a governance tool that undermines digital rights.
